title: Natural alternative for chemical weed killers and fossil-based mulch films in gardening
subtitle: COOPID project | Practice Abstracts | No. 02
description: A practice abstract for the COOPID project presenting straw pellets as a natural alternative to chemical weed killers and fossil-based mulch films in gardening. It outlines application rates and methods, and highlights benefits for weed suppression, water conservation, and soil quality improvement in horticulture and vegetable production.
